result: The raw survey datasets have been successfully cleaned and harmonised according to the specified requirements. The parental NS-SEC occupational class variables for mothers and fathers across five waves (ages 14-18) were loaded, merged by NSID, recoded to the 17-category NS-SEC classification, and harmonised for missing value codes. The resulting variables (nssecma14-18 and nssecpa14-18) were converted to labelled factor variables and exported to data/output/cleaned_data.csv.
